claim: REFERENCE (M-edge-allowlist): unreferenced = negation of an explicit 6-label allowlist (DERIVED_FROM/SUPPORTS/DEPENDS_ON/RELATES_TO/HAS_FAILURE/MENTIONS, forgetter.rs:41-48), NOT zero-incoming-edges; AUDIT/provenance/scope edges DELIBERATELY excluded ('an allowlist matching everything forgets nothing'). Layered spare short-circuits (expired/pin/promotion-lineage/attested) run first with typed SpareReason labels.
